lore.english:
Rogue Taimanin. The young head of the famed Koukawa family, as well as the clan's only survivor.

After Edwin Black killed her parents, she was taken in and raised by Asagi. She started gaining recognition from the age of 14 after performing well on dangerous missions.  However, she disappeared after ignoring orders from Asagi and challenging Edwin Black, which left her with serious injuries to her arms and legs.

After having been missing for a while, she emerged with mechanical arms and legs. Her highly advanced prosthetic arms can move like biological arms, they're powerful and precise like a machine, and have various built-in weapons. Now she's as powerful as Asagi and sows fear as the "Steel Reaper", destroying both human and demon members of the dark side.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Taimanin Art: Steel Wings[-]
skills.description:
Cuts down the enemy with the blade attached to the feet. 
[&Common_Word_Skill_ATKSPD]
skills.description_readable: Cuts down the enemy with the blade attached to the feet.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Taimanin Art: Heavenly Dance[-]
skills.description:
Consecutively attacks the enemy 5 times using the blades attached to the arms and legs.
If the target is a [&Destruction] type, [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] increases by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:160204]%)[-].
When defeating an enemy with this skill, gains an [&Common_Word_Skill_AddTurn].

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Asuka Special[-]
skills.description:
Moves quickly at an invisible speed to attack the enemy, then fires a powerful laser [A:1603] times to finish them off. 
[&Common_Word_Skill_ATKSPD]
Performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:160303]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DefPenetrate] attack.
Removes 1 [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&Buff] from the target [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionBefore].
